---
id: cancel-sms-for-sim-using-delete
title: "Delete SMS"
description: "Cancel a SMS message that is buffered to be delivered to the device with the SIM card but was not yet delivered."
sidebar_label: "Delete SMS"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: api/sim-management/sim-management
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete SMS"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/v1/sims/{iccid}/sms/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Cancel a SMS message that is buffered to be delivered to the device with the SIM card but was not yet delivered.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
